<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$开票方$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$receiptType$","fieldText":"$发票类型$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fplxdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerCompanyName$","fieldText":"$名 称$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$buyerTaxNo$","fieldText":"$税 号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfnsrsbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$remarks$","fieldText":"$发票备注$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$detailList$","fieldText":"$明细表1$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"mx","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$gmfgsdm$","fieldText":"$受票方选择$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfgsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c539454d0fdf6$","fieldText":"$建筑服务省市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"jzfwfsd","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c539457ff1db0$","fieldText":"$建筑服务详细地址$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fsdxxdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c53945d256194$","fieldText":"$建筑服务项目$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"jzxmmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c53945eeb7a5a$","fieldText":"$土地增值税$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"tdzzsxmbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5394610aa596$","fieldText":"$建筑是否跨地市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"kdsbz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390c02ad1d6$","fieldText":"$不动产权证号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fwcqzshm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390c6714006$","fieldText":"$不动产省市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bdcdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390c881d280$","fieldText":"$不动产详细地址$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"bdcxxdz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390eceb415e$","fieldText":"$起始日期$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlqq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390d27b86ae$","fieldText":"$结束日期$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlqz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3c5390f43f7e04$","fieldText":"$不动产跨地市$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"zlkdsbz","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3ce447434bd3d0$","fieldText":"$面积单位$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"mjdw","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/fplr?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N7" name="表单数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="400" y="1300"/>

<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_xfgs$","fieldText":"$开票方$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($fdId$,\"fd_files\")","fieldText":"$流程管理.获取流程表单指定控件的附件$($ID$,\"fd_files\")","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"file","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$gmfgsdm$","fieldText":"$受票方选择$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gmfgsdm","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/file_import?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N8" name="文件数据" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="580" y="1300"/>
